Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ory Sandel, Esq. of Idell & Seitel LLP, Tel. 415.986.2400, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS GREGORY RAIFMAN and SUSAN RAIFMAN's Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award And Judgment Thereon is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
